---
name: New Classification System Request
about: Request a classification system to be added to WorldOfTaxonomy
title: "feat: add [SYSTEM NAME] ([system_id])"
labels: ["new system", "help wanted"]
assignees: ""
---

## System Overview

**System name:**
<!-- e.g. "Brazilian National Classification of Economic Activities" -->

**Proposed system ID:**
<!-- Lowercase, underscores only. e.g. cnae_2012 -->

**Country / region:**
<!-- e.g. Brazil, European Union, Global -->

**Issuing authority:**
<!-- e.g. IBGE (Brazilian Institute of Geography and Statistics) -->

**Approximate number of codes:**
<!-- e.g. ~1,300 -->

---

## Data Source

**Official source URL:**
<!-- Direct link to the authoritative data download page -->

**License:**
<!-- e.g. Public domain, CC-BY, Creative Commons, government open data -->

**Data format available:**
<!-- CSV / XLSX / XML / JSON / HTML / PDF -->

**Can the ingester download it automatically?**
<!-- Yes / No (some require manual placement in data/) -->

---

## Classification Family

**Is this derived from an existing system?**
<!-- Check one:
- [ ] Derived from NACE Rev 2 (EU national adaptations - copy NACE nodes + add equivalences)
- [ ] Derived from ISIC Rev 4 (LATAM / Asia / Africa national adaptations)
- [ ] Standalone (requires its own ingester)
-->

**If derived, what diverges from the parent?**
<!-- e.g. "identical 4-digit codes, but adds 2 national-specific divisions" -->

---

## Why This System Matters

<!-- 2-3 sentences: who uses it, what decisions it drives, why it belongs in the graph -->

---

## Additional Context

<!-- Any crosswalk mappings that already exist between this system and others in the graph? -->
<!-- References to prior work, academic papers, or related issues? -->
